title: cyclosorus hastatopinnatus
intro: Cyclosorus hastatopinnatus, also known as the lance-crested cyclosorus or Cyclosorus hastatopinnatus, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus hastatopinnatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus hastatopinnatus are typically made by drying and processing the leaves or stems, which can be consumed as tea, capsules, or added to topical creams and ointments.
